calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Re Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Breather Products US, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Pamela E. Stevens, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Lyon & Swan Holdings, LLC.
Jennifer Sunia and Robert Izzo, Operations Manager and General Manager, respectively, at Lyon & Swan Holdings, LLC, were placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Stevens, Ms. Sunia and Mr. Izzo appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Breather Products US, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on September 15, 2020.
Plaintiff's first Amended Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on November 20, 2020, and personally served on defendant Breather Products US, Inc.'s registered Agent of Process on December 7, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 28, 2021.
Default as to defendant Breather Products US, Inc. was entered on February 9, 2021.

Plaintiff Lyon & Swan Holdings, LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint........................................ID/EVID
Exhibit B: Lease Agreement............................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit C: Recology Bill..............................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit D: Property Tax Spreadsheet...................................................ID/EVID
Exhibit E: Damage Summary.............................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Lyon & Swan Holdings, LLC, and against the defaulted defendant Breather Products US, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $114,168.53.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,119.99.
Attorney Fees - $21,785.00.
Costs - $1,000.71.

Total - $141,074.23.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
